records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't take orders from anyone, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't take orders from anyone, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't take orders from anyone, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-but aren't you all just mobilizing because the Administration told you to?
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-but aren't you all just mobilizing because the Administration told you to?
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-but aren't you all just mobilizing because the Administration told you to?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You haven't really been out on the ocean much, have you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You haven't really been out on the ocean much, have you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You haven't really been out on the ocean much, have you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...No? I have!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...No? I have!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...No? I have!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How could someone who's going to be the era's great pirate not have gone out to sea?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How could someone who's going to be the era's great pirate not have gone out to sea?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How could someone who's going to be the era's great pirate not have gone out to sea?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyahaha! You're terrible at lying.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyahaha! You're terrible at lying.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyahaha! You're terrible at lying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those pirates aren't following Administration orders. They're following the bounty the Administration's offering.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those pirates aren't following Administration orders. They're following the bounty the Administration's offering.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those pirates aren't following Administration orders. They're following the bounty the Administration's offering.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hunters work because they're getting proper commission fees.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hunters work because they're getting proper commission fees.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hunters work because they're getting proper commission fees.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We join hands to survive, but we can turn on each other anytime.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We join hands to survive, but we can turn on each other anytime.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We join hands to survive, but we can turn on each other anytime.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's the current relationship between pirates and hunters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's the current relationship between pirates and hunters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's the current relationship between pirates and hunters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And if you want to be a great pirate someday, get used to how things change.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And if you want to be a great pirate someday, get used to how things change.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And if you want to be a great pirate someday, get used to how things change.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're... treating me like a complete rookie?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're... treating me like a complete rookie?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're... treating me like a complete rookie?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She caught on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She caught on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She caught on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyahaha! You don't look it, but you're fun to tease.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyahaha! You don't look it, but you're fun to tease.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyahaha! You don't look it, but you're fun to tease.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've wondered for a while now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've wondered for a while now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've wondered for a while now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why do you want to become a great pirate?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why do you want to become a great pirate?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why do you want to become a great pirate?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thinking back to the rebellion... with your skills, you don't need to become a pirate at all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thinking back to the rebellion... with your skills, you don't need to become a pirate at all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thinking back to the rebellion... with your skills, you don't need to become a pirate at all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Obviously because I want to free the city from the Administration that's been oppressing people's freedom.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Obviously because I want to free the city from the Administration that's been oppressing people's freedom.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Obviously because I want to free the city from the Administration that's been oppressing people's freedom.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration controls the ocean and has stolen people's freedom.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration controls the ocean and has stolen people's freedom.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration controls the ocean and has stolen people's freedom.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pirates became criminals just for going out to sea without permission.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pirates became criminals just for going out to sea without permission.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pirates became criminals just for going out to sea without permission.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Doesn't that piss you off?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Doesn't that piss you off?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Doesn't that piss you off?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've got this all wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've got this all wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've got this all wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pirates don't care about the rules on land.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pirates don't care about the rules on land.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pirates don't care about the rules on land.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think we became pirates because we hate being "oppressed"?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think we became pirates because we hate being "oppressed"?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think we became pirates because we hate being "oppressed"?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nope.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nope.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nope.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is the Administration hunting us like rats and restricting all our activities?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is the Administration hunting us like rats and restricting all our activities?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is the Administration hunting us like rats and restricting all our activities?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not that either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not that either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not that either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sonya, why did you go out to sea and become a pirate?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sonya, why did you go out to sea and become a pirate?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sonya, why did you go out to sea and become a pirate?

records.m_Talk_ENG: To eat freshly caught fish.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To eat freshly caught fish.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To eat freshly caught fish.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then what about you? Why'd you come out to sea and become a pirate?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then what about you? Why'd you come out to sea and become a pirate?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then what about you? Why'd you come out to sea and become a pirate?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like I said before...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like I said before...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like I said before...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's not something you need to go out to sea to accomplish.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's not something you need to go out to sea to accomplish.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's not something you need to go out to sea to accomplish.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You don't need to be a pirate to do that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't need to be a pirate to do that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't need to be a pirate to do that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But becoming a pirate just to eat fresh fish makes sense?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But becoming a pirate just to eat fresh fish makes sense?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But becoming a pirate just to eat fresh fish makes sense?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyahaha! It wasn't a boring answer, so I liked it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyahaha! It wasn't a boring answer, so I liked it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyahaha! It wasn't a boring answer, so I liked it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someday, you'll be able to give an answer like that too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someday, you'll be able to give an answer like that too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someday, you'll be able to give an answer like that too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look forward to that day!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look forward to that day!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look forward to that day!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, we're not here to chit-chat. Let's go make ourselves a big score.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, we're not here to chit-chat. Let's go make ourselves a big score.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, we're not here to chit-chat. Let's go make ourselves a big score.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The more C.O.s we take down, the more tokens the Administration pays out!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The more C.O.s we take down, the more tokens the Administration pays out!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The more C.O.s we take down, the more tokens the Administration pays out!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch. Fine, whatever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch. Fine, whatever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch. Fine, whatever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Detecting a C.O. cluster 100 meters ahead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Detecting a C.O. cluster 100 meters ahead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Detecting a C.O. cluster 100 meters ahead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we keep going straight...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we keep going straight...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we keep going straight...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain! Found them! I found them!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain! Found them! I found them!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain! Found them! I found them!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A whole batch of C.O.s ready to pop!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A whole batch of C.O.s ready to pop!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A whole batch of C.O.s ready to pop!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I brought them all here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I brought them all here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I brought them all here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: As expected of the Sharks' first mate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As expected of the Sharks' first mate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As expected of the Sharks' first mate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. If they get any closer, the ship might take damage. Take care of them from there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. If they get any closer, the ship might take damage. Take care of them from there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. If they get any closer, the ship might take damage. Take care of them from there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And don't worry, I'm getting great footage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And don't worry, I'm getting great footage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And don't worry, I'm getting great footage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, Captain!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, Captain!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, Captain!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was trying to hunt these C.O.s behind your back and take the tokens for myself!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was trying to hunt these C.O.s behind your back and take the tokens for myself!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was trying to hunt these C.O.s behind your back and take the tokens for myself!

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-but their numbers kept increasing...
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-but their numbers kept increasing...
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-but their numbers kept increasing...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just please save me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just please save me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just please save me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: My get-rich-quick dream! My carefree life! Waaah!
records.m_Talk_DEU: My get-rich-quick dream! My carefree life! Waaah!
records.m_Talk_FRA: My get-rich-quick dream! My carefree life! Waaah!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyaha, ask her yourself after we save her.
